name: Monastery Mentor
oracle_text:
Prowess
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 white Monk creature token with prowess.
design_notes: A rare creature that generates value over time. Demonstrates the 'build-around' design pattern: rewards you for casting noncreature spells with token generation. The tokens also have prowess, creating exponential scaling. Shows how rares can have more complex triggered abilities than commons/uncommons. The 2/2 body for 3 mana is below rate, but the upside potential is enormous.
